_readme: Project → destination registry for the distribution step (Step 6 of plaud-sync-prompt.txt).
Keys must EXACTLY match the 'Project' select options in the Plaud Synced Notes database.
url: the Notion page or database where this project's notes should be distributed.
Leave empty ('') to disable distribution for that project (notes stay Routing=Pending).
The watcher reads this file fresh for every email — edits take effect on the NEXT run,
